<?php namespace Faker\Provider\lt_LT; class Company extends \Faker\Provider\Company { protected static $formats = [ '{{companySuffix}} {{lastNameMale}}', '{{companySuffix}} {{lastNameMale}} ir {{lastNameMale}}', '{{companySuffix}} "{{lastNameMale}} ir {{lastNameMale}}"', '{{companySuffix}} "{{lastNameMale}}"', ]; protected static $companySuffix = ['UAB', 'AB', 'IĮ', 'MB', 'VŠĮ']; }
